subcodes.first_line: This is a Tablet from Our presence unto him who hath turned towards the Dawning-Place of the Lights, that the fragrances of the verses may attract him and draw him nigh [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: هذا لوح من لدنا الی الذی اقبل الی مشرق الانوار لتجذبه نفحات الایات و تقربه
subcodes.subjects: @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @firmness in the Covenant
